review_findings_closed.finding: Provider metadata contained nested repository context that strict OpenAI-compatible providers can reject.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Provider metadata is now limited to flat string values; full repository context remains model-visible in prompt messages.

review_findings_closed.finding: Repository excerpts were collected without content-level secret redaction before provider use.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Collected text excerpts are redacted through the runtime redaction path before hashing and provider context construction.

review_findings_closed.finding: Memory evidence verification required evidence for all committed non-working kinds, while write() only requires it for selected mission-scoped kinds.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Verifier now reuses the same evidence-required kind set as write(): DECISION, FAILURE, FAILURE_EXPERIENCE, PATCH.

review_findings_closed.finding: Self-reference exemption suppressed weak literal credentials such as password = password.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Self-reference exemption is now limited to uppercase enum/constant identifiers.

review_findings_closed.finding: Dashboard approval flow exposed no way to execute missions after approval.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Mission Workspace now provides an explicit run action for Execution missions using the existing runMission API.
Mission snapshots now include plan, and the workspace renders mission.plan.steps.

review_findings_closed.finding: Receipt-chain checks trusted raw tool payloads without verifying tool record envelopes.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Receipt-chain verification now audits tool record envelopes and fails chain_intact on corrupt tool records.

review_findings_closed.finding: Mission mutation endpoints returned raw Mission objects, causing the UI to lose snapshot-only fields after pause/resume/rollback/safe-mode.
review_findings_closed.resolution: Mission mutation endpoints now return inspect_mission snapshots; the workspace reloads the complete mission snapshot after each mutation.

additional_determinism_fix.reason: Full pytest exposed DNS-dependent nondeterminism in an allowlisted-domain authorization test.
additional_determinism_fix.resolution: Explicitly allowlisted domains no longer require ambient DNS when no resolved_ip is supplied; caller-supplied resolved_ip still receives IP safety validation.
